summary: A narrated USCIS policy recap ('USCIS Reviews Categorical Parole Processes') on halting CHNV and other parole programs after Trump's 'Securing Our Borders' executive order. It uses title cards, B-roll of Trump signing an order, a Federal Register screenshot about terminating parole for Cubans, Haitians, Nicaraguans and Venezuelans, and a CBP Home app self-deportation promo, closing on a USCIS.gov card. It is an informational, voiceover-driven recap with no music or genre/youth-appeal treatment.
notable_text: USCIS Reviews Categorical Parole Processes; Termination of Parole Processes for Cubans, Haitians, Nicaraguans, and Venezuelans; CBP Home App - Use the CBP Home app today to self-deport and protect your future; USCIS.gov
